summary: Completed frontend testing of GERdoctor iteration 18 - Partner user detail overlay improvements. All requested features are working correctly: 1) Step 1 shows all form fields with proper labels (Name, Vorname, Telefon, Adresse, Fachgebiet, Dokumente), 2) Multiupload documents show document type badges (Visum, Antrag auf Approbation) with download links, 3) Download links point to /api/files/{file_id} URLs, 4) Step 2 shows selected_partner_name=ILS, 5) Steps 3-8 show 'Keine Daten eingegeben' for empty completed steps, 6) All 8 step rows visible in scrollable dialog, 7) Partner sees unique users only (no duplicates).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified partner detail overlay improvements: 1) Form fields display with labels from step.fields[].label, 2) Multiupload fields render each entry with document_type badge + download link using data-testid='download-{order}-{field}-{index}', 3) Download links use filesAPI.getUrl() which returns /api/files/{file_id}, 4) Partner selection steps show selected_partner_id and selected_partner_name (no field definitions so labels are formatted from raw keys), 5) Empty completed steps show 'Keine Daten eingegeben'. Chris has all 8 steps completed with data in steps 1, 2, 5, 7.
